title: Data-Driven Decision Making
summary: From data to decisions with confidence and clarity.
description: A managerial course on using data, evidence and structured judgement to improve decisions while recognising uncertainty, bias and organisational constraints.
audience: Graduate and postgraduate students, managers and technical leaders responsible for evidence-based choices.
outcomes: Distinguish information, evidence and managerial judgement.
Define decision criteria and relevant measures.
Interpret uncertainty and common analytical limitations.
Challenge assumptions and reduce decision bias.
Present an evidence-based recommendation to stakeholders.

modules.title: Decision quality and evidence
modules.description: Decision frames, criteria and information value.

modules.title: Communicating decisions
modules.description: Recommendation structure, visual evidence and action.
